description: Modify the rocket design at /home/ga/Documents/rockets/simple_model_rocket.ork for a 12.0 m/s high-wind launch by overhauling its recovery system. Configure the simulation for a 12.0 m/s average windspeed, set the existing parachute to deploy at 50m altitude, and add a streamer to the body tube that deploys at apogee. Save the updated rocket file and write a post-flight analysis report to /home/ga/Documents/exports/wind_mitigation_report.txt documenting the tested wind speed (12.0 m/s), total simulated drift, and ground hit velocity.
